_comment: Real-world JSX/TSX corpus for the jsx_conformance gate.
Each entry: { path: <repo-rel>, lang: jsx|tsx, skip?: bool,
The auto-discovery already pulls in tests/fixtures/spec/jsx/*.js
(parsed with --lang=tsx — ambiguity stress between JSX and TS
generics). This manifest is for vendored real-world .jsx / .tsx
files added later. Empty-set is the current state.
